In her course towards the east, if the Moon tenanting the 7th
house from the Sun, does not swerve much either to the north or
the south (when her declination is very little), she enters the earth's
shadow,

The Moon situated below and moving from the west obstructs
the solar disc like a cloud. The solar eclipse, therefore, is different
in different countries according to the visibility of the eclipsed
disc.
